pass-info.name: INFO
pass-info.notes: Initial info/depth pass from the authored INFO render pass.

pass-picking.name: PICKING Pass
pass-picking.notes: Picking / world-space info pass from the authored PICKING Pass render pass.

pass-background.name: Background & Environment
pass-background.notes: Collapsed singleton background/environment branch: clear resolved color, gradient, skybox, atmosphere, and optional info copy.

pass-ao.name: Ambient Occlusion
pass-ao.notes: Collapsed RT AO / HBAO branch plus AO history maintenance.

pass-decals.name: Decals
pass-decals.notes: Clear decal surfaces or dispatch decals compute depending on the decals toggle.

pass-selection-outlines.name: Selection Outlines
pass-selection-outlines.notes: Collapsed both selection buffer variants plus final AA compose.

pass-main-opaque.name: Main Opaque
pass-main-opaque.notes: Collapsed the two duplicate MAIN OPAQUE MSAA passes (reflectEnvironmentSetting on/off branches) into one representative pass.

pass-transparent.name: Transparent
pass-transparent.notes: Collapsed stochastic and regular transparent branches plus final transparent compose.

pass-reflections-aa.name: Reflections & AA
pass-reflections-aa.notes: Collapsed SSR, specular filtering, reflection compose, DLAA, FXAA, TAA, sharpen, edge outlines, pointer highlight, remove background, and metallic/roughness visualization.

pass-volumetric-dof-bloom-grade.name: Volumetric, DoF, Bloom & Color Grading
pass-volumetric-dof-bloom-grade.notes: Collapsed volumetric lighting, DoF, bloom pyramid, color grading, and optional sharpen.

pass-point-clouds.name: Point Clouds
pass-point-clouds.notes: Point cloud clear, render, HQ path, and resolve.
